hooks.command: sid=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty' < /dev/stdin); [ -z "$sid" ] && exit 0; mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/.pw-state"; [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/.pw-state/$sid" ] && exit 0; echo 'PLANWRIGHT ALIGNMENT GATE: call planwright_check_alignment with your agentRunId before editing files in this session.' >&2; exit 2
